limitations: Skipped without MediaPipe; affected by glasses, gaze direction, face angle, and frame rate.
Requires calibrated lighting and per-user baseline for meaningful screening.
Sensitive to motion, compression, lighting, skin visibility, and camera auto-exposure.
Use for trend/demo screening only unless validated against ECG/PPG hardware.
heart_rate.method: RGB face rPPG, POS/CHROM spectral peak

limitations: RGB rPPG peak timing is much less reliable than ECG.
Short recordings cannot support clinical HRV interpretation.
Pixel-space sway is not comparable across camera distances without calibration.
lateral_sway.method: Frame-to-frame body-center variability from pose landmarks

limitations: Not an atrial-fibrillation detector; ECG is required for rhythm diagnosis.
pulse_irregularity_index.method: Coefficient of variation of rPPG peak intervals

limitations: Body sway, talking, clothing, camera motion, and poor torso framing can dominate breathing motion.
Radar/depth/thermal sensors are more robust for respiration.
respiratory_rate.method: Low-frequency motion spectrum in torso ROI

limitations: Needs a full-body walking view and camera geometry calibration for real gait speed/stride length.
Use depth camera or calibrated multi-camera setup for clinical gait analysis.

non_video_measurements.blood_pressure: Requires cuff, calibrated PPG/PTT hardware, or validated cuffless device; raw video is insufficient.
non_video_measurements.breath_voc: Requires gas sensors, e-nose, spectroscopy, or lab analysis.
non_video_measurements.ecg_rhythm: Requires electrodes or radar system validated for cardiac waveform recovery.
non_video_measurements.environment: Requires environmental sensors for CO2, PM2.5, formaldehyde, humidity, noise, etc.
non_video_measurements.fundus_retina: Requires fundus optics/illumination; standard face video is not enough.
non_video_measurements.glucose: Requires CGM, blood, saliva, sweat, or validated spectroscopy hardware.
non_video_measurements.saliva_diagnostics: Requires biochemical assay/cartridge; video cannot infer cortisol/glucose/pathogens.
non_video_measurements.skin_temperature: Requires calibrated IR/thermal camera, not ordinary RGB video.
non_video_measurements.spo2: Requires multispectral/NIR calibration or pulse oximeter; RGB video alone is not reliable.
non_video_measurements.tcm_tongue: Possible from controlled tongue images, but needs a trained/validated model and lighting protocol.
non_video_measurements.urinalysis: Requires urine strip/cartridge images with controlled lighting and reference calibration.

warnings: MediaPipe is not installed; blink and pose/gait measurements were skipped.
